name: Gold and Silver Traders
description_short: Gold and Silver Traders is a credit repair provider based in Seattle, Washington. Rated 3.8/5 with 76 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Gold and Silver Traders is a credit repair provider serving clients in Seattle, Washington. Carrying a 3.8/5.0 Google rating from 76 reviews, Gold and Silver Traders has an solid reputation among consumers in the Seattle area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a coin dealer, diamond buyer, Gold and Silver Traders provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions.

When evaluating credit repair services in Seattle, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Gold and Silver Traders operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Seattle, Washington area who are considering Gold and Silver Traders should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
